name: The Harness Effect: How Orchestration Design Sets the Token Economics of Enterprise Agentic AI (2607.06906)

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: Agentic AI development today runs on token maxing: buying capability with tokens longer reasoning traces, more turns, wider tool payloads, bigger replayed contexts so tokens per task grow faster than task value. We argue the decisive lever against token maxing is the harness: the orchestration layer that assembles context, exposes tools, sequences turns, delegates work, and carries enterprise observability.
